BLACKPINK（韓語：블랙핑크）是YG娛樂於2016年推出的韓國女子音樂組合，由JISOO、JENNIE、ROSÉ與LISA四名成員組成。2016年8月8日以數碼專輯《SQUARE ONE》正式出道。

YG娛樂表示BLACK PINK帶有稍微否定粉紅色是最美的顏色的涵義，具有「漂亮並不代表全部」的反轉意義，也表示成員們不僅具備外貌、同時也兼具實力。

replies.msg:
講個笑話
Many great things to happen in 2019

I saw Blackpink live twice at Saitama Super Arena which was absolutely incredible and unforgettable. The first time I saw their concert with my friends, we were late. I remember I said "Look at the time. The concert will have started" It was quarter past eight. The concert would've begun by then. They've been strutting their stuff since they were children so don't sell them short. At the end of their last encore they bowed onstage soaking up the applause. They met with a standing ovation and thunderous applause. The group and the dancers and acrobats who were invited to perform alongside the group gave a superb performance. The choreography, the stage and lighting design and the glow sticks were magnificent and surpassed expectations. It was a worthwhile concert that was compelling enough to see again. They're very career-minded. My brother who's also very career-oriented is planning on having them endorse his company's products but he'll have to make it financially worthwhile for them. They have a worthwhile job and career. I regard music performing and acting as a worthwhile career. Besides being an incredible musician, the lead singer is an avid runner. She took part in a three thousand metre race where she came first. She rose to the occasion, ran for all she was worth and dived over the finish line passing the runners who were ahead of her earlier. Loads of fans congratulated her on having won the race as she held up the trophy. The race was the opportunity for all the best female runners in Seoul to strut their stuff. It was truly memorable. Yesterday I assigned three and a half hours for practising their songs on my trumpet, cornet, trombone, euphonium, French horn and tuba. I practised with my friends who played triangle, tambourine, castanets, sleigh bells (jingle bells), cymbals (hi-hat, ride, clash), gongs, snare drum and bass drum, all of which have indefinite pitch. Adding these instruments makes the music more rhythmic. Saxophone, cor anglais (english horn) and clarinet are transposing instruments. Saxophone, clarinet and bass clarinet are single reed instrument while oboe, cor anglais, bassoon and contrabassoon are double reed instrument. Flute is a reedless instrument.
